node_description: A Node exposes device-side capabilities to your agent. Your agent can read these details and use available commands to help with daily tasks directly on this device.
These are the actions this node currentl: These are the actions this node currently exposes to agents.
Share basic device information with agen: Share basic device information with agents.
Share battery, storage and system status: Share battery, storage and system status with agents.
Show a local notification on this device: Show a local notification on this device.
Open the camera and capture a new photo.
Pick an existing photo from this device.
Save generated images to this device.
Control which capabilities agents can us: Control which capabilities agents can use on this device.
Only this device can change which action: Only this device can change which actions it exposes to agents.
Available means this node currently adve: Available means this node currently advertises that capability.
Turn capabilities on/off for Node Mode o: Turn capabilities on/off for Node Mode on this device. Changes reconnect the node and update advertised commands.
Capability switches are only editable fo: Capability switches are only editable for the current device node.
Showing up to {{limit}} most recent node: Showing up to {{limit}} most recent node.invoke calls for this node.
These snapshots are fetched directly fro: These snapshots are fetched directly from node commands that do not require extra system permissions.
This node does not advertise device.info: This node does not advertise device.info.
This node does not advertise device.stat: This node does not advertise device.status.
node_lan_hint: To enable and use node capabilities, you must connect via LAN (local network).
node_lan_copy_hint: Copy the command above, run it on your computer, then scan the newly generated QR code to connect in node mode.
Missing permission: operator.admin. Reco: Missing permission: operator.admin. Reconnect with an admin-capable Gateway token and try again.
